title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 16th March 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Avoid until clarity; fertilizer crisis hurts imported-ore converters
recommendations.detail: He said it is unfavourable because India mostly imports phosphate ore and then converts it, so even this resilient stock has started falling sharply, sliding from a stable Rs 130-140 in February to about Rs 110. Kharif season is starting and a good monsoon could help, but an uneven monsoon would hit fertilizer usage. As of now he would avoid until stability and clarity come.

recommendations.note: Long-term holders only can slowly accumulate on promoter buying
recommendations.detail: He flagged it as one of the promoter-buying stocks from his morning remarks: promoters made a significant purchase one day with big volume, pushing the stock up nearly 20% that day. But he stressed the worst is not over, though the December result is better. Only long-term-view investors should slowly accumulate, for that one reason.

recommendations.note: Don't average; should have exited in December on weak result
recommendations.detail: He said the stock has already fallen to about a third of its price, but this weakness came from a weak December result, not just the current market. He noted the investor could have exited safely at Rs 150-160 in December. Not exiting then and reconsidering averaging now is not correct; average only after the market settles.

recommendations.note: Not a bad stock; average only after market settles
recommendations.detail: He grouped it with ADSL and Olectra as not bad or penny stocks, but said there is nothing much to do now. Definitely do any averaging only after the market settles.

recommendations.note: Mild bottom-fishing only; oil crisis could lift EV demand
recommendations.detail: He noted ongoing execution and repeated CEO-change issues and a lack of expected company news. But one advantage now is that the oil crisis could make EV demand jump, so EV companies may perform a bit better. A bottom-fishing attempt could pay off, but only in mild quantity.

recommendations.note: Cement sector firmer on volume; infra boost and pre-monsoon demand
recommendations.detail: He said weekend press (Economic Times and a couple of papers) covered the cement sector, and this morning cement stocks are performing better on volume. UltraTech is the leading gainer at +3%, followed by Grasim, with Ambuja Cements also working resiliently. The Government may boost infra and cement consumption could improve ahead of the rainy season.

recommendations.note: Hold; no fresh buying, stock became very speculative
recommendations.detail: He said the stock became very speculative, touching 52-week highs easily on a steady uptrend and then falling by half. The latest result was good enough for a small rebound. He advised hold; fresh buying he would not advise.

recommendations.note: Looking much better; large-cap marriage-gift pick
recommendations.detail: Asked to name marriage-gift stocks, he picked Hindalco, saying it is definitely looking much, much better right now. He grouped it with L&T as two solid large-caps to take.

recommendations.note: Solid large-cap; marriage-gift pick alongside Hindalco
recommendations.detail: He named L&T as the second of two large-cap picks for the marriage-gift question, alongside Hindalco. He advised taking both as solid large-caps.
